title: ACM Weekly Meeting
description: Join UofSC ACM for announcements, technical lightning talks, and small-group project check-ins. New members are welcome.

title: Intramural Indoor Soccer Registration Night
description: Meet teammates, ask rec staff questions, and complete same-night team registration for the upcoming indoor season.

title: Free Food Friday: Pancake Pop-Up
description: The Student Government breakfast pop-up is first-come, first-served while supplies last. Bring your CarolinaCard.

title: ACM Resume + Internship Prep
description: Peer resume critiques, interview warmups, and internship search tips from upperclassmen and alumni volunteers.

title: Intramural Flag Football Captains Briefing
description: Captains review game rules, schedules, and sportsmanship standards before the first week of league play.
